model_output_raw_text: {"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 12","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Increase MLP width to raise representational capacity under the fixed 256-step budget; this is a simple single-constant architecture change with high expected impact for the flat MLP workload.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"OPTIMIZER = \"adamw\"","old":"OPTIMIZER = \"adam\"","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Switch to AdamW and raise step size to improve early optimization efficiency and generalization within the fixed 256-step budget for this MLP.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"USE_BATCHNORM = False","old":"USE_BATCHNORM = True","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Disable BatchNorm in the flat MLP to reduce optimization noise from small-batch feature-statistics and improve stability over the short fixed-step training budget.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"USE_BATCHNORM = True","old":"USE_BATCHNORM = False","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Re-enable BatchNorm since disabling it caused a large regression; restoring normalization should recover optimization stability and reduce validation loss under the short training budget.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Slightly reduce the initial AdamW learning rate while keeping cosine decay, aiming for better late-step fit and lower validation loss within the fixed 256-step schedule.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-4","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Increase AdamW weight decay to strengthen regularization for the wider MLP, targeting lower validation loss with the same optimization schedule.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"","old":"","op":"delete_exact","source":"","text":"            torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_(model.parameters(), 5.0)\n"}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Remove gradient clipping to avoid dampening AdamW updates; with BatchNorm and cosine decay, unclipped gradients may improve convergence over the short fixed-step run.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"            torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_(model.parameters(), 5.0)
            optimizer.step()
","old":"            optimizer.step()
","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Roll back to the previously best-performing optimization settings by restoring the higher initial learning rate, lighter weight decay, and gradient clipping that matched the lowest observed validation loss.","secondary_modes":["caching","micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 64","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Increase batch size under fixed-step evaluation to expose the model to more examples per update and reduce gradient noise, which can improve validation loss within the same 256-step budget.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Continue scaling batch size in fixed-step mode so each of the 256 optimizer updates sees more examples, which often improves validation loss for this MLP setup.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 512","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Test further batch scaling in fixed-step mode to increase data coverage per optimizer update, which may continue improving validation loss for this stable AdamW+cosine configuration.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 1024","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 512","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Push batch scaling further in fixed-step training to maximize sample coverage per update and potentially reduce validation loss again.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.5e-3","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"With the much larger batch size, raise learning rate to better match the reduced gradient noise and improve optimization progress over the fixed 256 steps.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 20","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Increase MLP width now that optimization is stable at large batch and higher learning rate, targeting lower bias and better validation loss within the same fixed-step budget.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"DEPTH = 3","old":"DEPTH = 2","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Add one hidden layer to increase representational capacity now that large-batch optimization is stable, aiming to reduce validation loss further.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2e-3","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.5e-3","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Increase learning rate modestly to better optimize the deeper/wider MLP under large-batch training while cosine decay still anneals toward the end of the fixed-step run.","secondary_modes":["layout"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.5e-3","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2e-3","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Step back to the better-performing learning rate after the higher value regressed validation loss.","secondary_modes":["layout"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Slightly reduce regularization to allow better fit in the deeper high-batch regime, which may lower validation loss at the fixed training horizon.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.1","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.0","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Add light dropout to improve generalization in the deeper, wider high-batch MLP while keeping the rest of the strong optimization setup unchanged.","secondary_modes":["layout"]}
